author: Vinayak Gautham
summary: Published the Repository Governance Charter. Defines the seven principles that govern all contributions: evidence before inference, deterministic computation before AI, every rule has legal authority, every decision is traceable, every rule is tested, every change is versioned, architecture changes require measurable justification. Includes release quality profile format and Phase 5 epic priorities.
notes: The charter is a permanent document. It does not expire and is updated only by a Change record approved by the repository maintainer. This is the last document before Phase 5 (Knowledge Expansion) begins.
